'''''Harpy''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] serving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The frigate was present at the [[attack on the Gelgelar system]] where it attempted to attack the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']]. ''Harpy'' was destroyed by Rebel [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
